name: Enterprise Introduction
subject: {{company_name}} + SalesEdge: Unlocking Revenue Intelligence for {{industry}}
body:
Dear {{contact_name}},

I noticed {{company_name}} recently {{trigger_event}}. Given the pace of growth in {{industry}}, I thought you might find value in how companies like {{reference_customer}} are using SalesEdge to:

- Increase pipeline velocity by 35% using AI-powered deal intelligence
- Reduce churn risk with predictive early warnings
- Leverage India-specific market signals (RBI policy, SEBI updates, budget announcements) for smarter prospecting

We're built ground-up for Indian B2B, with native integrations for GST, MCA data, and DPIIT startup intelligence.

Would you have 20 minutes this week for a quick conversation?

Warm regards,
{{sender_name}}
{{sender_title}}, SalesEdge
target_persona: VP Sales / CRO / Head of Revenue

name: Market Signal Follow-Up
subject: How {{signal_title}} impacts {{company_name}}'s sales strategy
body:
Hi {{contact_name}},

I saw the recent news about {{signal_title}}. This could have significant implications for {{company_name}}'s {{affected_area}}.

At SalesEdge, we automatically ingest signals like these from RBI, SEBI, and 50+ Indian business intelligence sources, and correlate them with your pipeline to surface:

- Deals at risk due to regulatory shifts
- New prospects in sectors with tailwinds
- Competitive moves that affect your positioning

Our customers in {{industry}} typically see these signals 2-3 weeks before their competitors react.

Happy to walk you through a live example with your industry data.

Best,
{{sender_name}}

name: Competitive Displacement
subject: Why {{competitor}} users in India are switching to SalesEdge
body:
Hi {{contact_name}},

I understand {{company_name}} currently uses {{competitor}} for CRM. We've been hearing from several {{industry}} companies that while {{competitor}} works globally, it falls short on India-specific needs:

- No native INR formatting (lakhs/crores) or Indian number grouping
- Limited integration with Indian data sources (MCA, GST, DPIIT, OGD)
- Pricing that doesn't account for Indian team structures
- No built-in understanding of Indian FY (April-March), regulatory calendar, or RBI policy impact

{{reference_customer}} made the switch last quarter and saw a {{metric_improvement}} improvement in {{metric_area}}.

Would a 15-minute comparison walkthrough be helpful?

Regards,
{{sender_name}}
target_persona: CTO / VP Sales Ops / Revenue Operations

name: Startup / DPIIT Introduction
subject: Built for Indian startups: Sales intelligence that scales with {{company_name}}
body:
Hi {{contact_name}},

Congratulations on {{company_name}}'s growth — {{trigger_event}}.

As a DPIIT-recognised startup scaling rapidly, you need a sales stack that understands the Indian market from day one. SalesEdge is purpose-built for this:

- Start free, scale as you grow (startup-friendly pricing)
- Auto-enrichment from MCA, DPIIT, and Indian business data
- AI deal coaching calibrated for Indian B2B sales cycles
- Pipeline analytics in lakhs/crores with FY-aligned reporting

We're trusted by {{startup_count}}+ Indian startups including {{reference_startups}}.

Want to see a 10-minute demo tailored for {{industry}}?

Cheers,
{{sender_name}}
